info.name: Microsoft Azure NetworkManagerActiveConfiguration
info.description: The Microsoft Azure Network Manager Active Configuration API provides a RESTful set of web services that interact with Microsoft Azure Network Manager service to list all active configuration by network manager.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Listactiveconnectivityconfigurations

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the network manager.

request.description: Lists active connectivity configurations in a network manager.

response.name: Post successful. The operation returns the specified Managed Network active connectivity configuration resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Listactivesecurityadminrules

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the network manager.

request.description: Lists active security admin rules in a network manager.

response.name: Post successful. The operation returns the specified Managed Network active security admin rules resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Listactivesecurityuserrules

request.description: Lists Active Security User Rules in a network manager.
